introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: Variable
introduced_concepts.definition: A placeholder quantity whose value can vary in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 公式中取值可以变化的占位量。

views.name: Mean
views.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
views.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

introduced_concepts.name: Optimal Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The trait value at which the fitness function reaches its optimum.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 使适合度函数达到最大值的性状取值。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: E Power -at
introduced_concepts.definition: See Karlin and Taylor (1981) for a derivation.
